css_injection_rpo.description: Relative Path Overwrite -- manipulate URL path to override CSS/JS imports using relative paths, enabling CSS-based data exfiltration

probes.description: RPO path confusion -- URL-encoded slash in path causes server to resolve different page but browser resolves relative CSS/JS from manipulated base path
Double-encoded dot traversal -- server normalizes path but browser uses raw URL for relative path resolution, loading attacker-controlled CSS
Semicolon path parameter -- server ignores semicolon suffix but browser includes it in base URL, breaking relative path resolution for CSS/JS imports

css_exfiltration.description: CSS-based data exfiltration via RPO -- once RPO is confirmed, inject CSS attribute selectors to steal page content character by character

probes.description: CSS injection via RPO -- if page content is interpreted as CSS due to RPO, inject universal selector with Collaborator background URL
CSS attribute selector exfiltration -- steal input values one character at a time via attribute selectors in injected CSS
